title: Text Classifier fails with invalid type error
symptom: The Text Classifier node throws an error indicating it expected an object but received an array when processing input.
applies_when: The 'Use Responses API' option is enabled
not_this_if: The 'Use Responses API' option is disabled
root_cause: The Text Classifier node is designed to process input in a specific format. When the 'Use Responses API' option is enabled, it expects an object structure but receives an array instead, leading to a parsing error.
fix_steps: Open the settings for the Text Classifier node
agent_instruction: Disable the 'Use Responses API' option in the Text Classifier node settings.
